_meta.purpose: Slice 105 — CyberSygn freebie contract templates library. Each entry powers a tile on /templates/, an SEO landing page at /templates/<slug>/, and the on-the-fly PDF generator in worker/src/templates-library.js.
_meta.disclaimer: Every generated PDF includes 'Template provided by CyberSygn. Not legal advice. Consult a licensed attorney for your specific situation.'
_meta.leadCapture: Email captured on download/send → fed into the free-tier drip pipeline (drip:<emailHash> KV record), so download converts to a tracked signup.

templates.title: Master Services Agreement
templates.shortDescription: Vendor contracts, retainer agreements, consulting MSAs.
templates.metaDescription: Free Master Services Agreement template. Generic MSA structure for vendor contracts, retainers, and consulting engagements. Download or email it — your choice.
templates.longBlurb: A Master Services Agreement (MSA) is the umbrella contract that defines legal and commercial terms between a service provider and a client across all subsequent engagements. Statements of Work then reference the MSA for terms.

templates.title: Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.shortDescription: Mutual NDAs, one-way confidentiality, due-diligence wrappers.
templates.metaDescription: Free Non-Disclosure Agreement template. Mutual or one-way confidentiality structure for vendor diligence, employee onboarding, M&A. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) protects confidential information shared between parties from being disclosed to third parties. This template supports both mutual and one-way variants.

templates.title: Employment Agreement
templates.shortDescription: W-2 offer letters, 1099 contractor agreements, advisor terms.
templates.metaDescription: Free Employment Agreement template. W-2 employee offer letter structure with compensation, scope, IP assignment, and termination. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: An employment agreement defines the working relationship between an employer and a W-2 employee. Compensation, scope, intellectual property assignment, confidentiality, and termination terms.

templates.title: Rental Lease
templates.shortDescription: Residential leases, commercial subleases, room rentals.
templates.metaDescription: Free Rental Lease template. Residential lease structure for landlord-tenant agreements covering rent, security deposit, term, and use. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A residential rental lease is the binding agreement between landlord and tenant covering rent amount, security deposit, lease term, allowed use of the property, and obligations of both parties.

templates.title: Photography Contract
templates.shortDescription: Shoot agreements, model releases, image licensing.
templates.metaDescription: Free Photography Contract template. Shoot agreement structure for photographers covering deliverables, payment, usage rights, and cancellation. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A photography contract defines the shoot details, deliverables, payment terms, and image-licensing rights between photographer and client. Protects both parties on cancellations, edits, and ownership.

templates.title: Coaching Agreement
templates.shortDescription: Engagement terms, intake forms, cancellation policies.
templates.metaDescription: Free Coaching Agreement template. Engagement terms structure for life, executive, or business coaches covering package, fees, and cancellation policy. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A coaching agreement establishes the working relationship between coach and client. Frequency of sessions, package fees, cancellation policy, confidentiality, and expectations on both sides.

templates.title: Freelance Contract
templates.shortDescription: Project SOWs, milestone payments, IP transfer clauses.
templates.metaDescription: Free Freelance Contract template. Project agreement structure for freelancers covering scope, milestones, payment, and IP transfer. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A freelance contract defines scope, deadlines, deliverables, payment milestones, and IP transfer between an independent freelancer and a client. Single-project or ongoing.

templates.title: SAFE / Investor Agreement
templates.shortDescription: YC SAFE templates, convertible notes, advisor agreements.
templates.metaDescription: Free SAFE / Investor Agreement template structure for early-stage fundraising. Based on YC SAFE patterns. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A Simple Agreement for Future Equity (SAFE) is the YC-popularized fundraising instrument for early-stage startups. This template provides a generic structure mirroring the common patterns.

templates.title: Consulting Agreement
templates.metaDescription: Free Consulting Agreement template. Engagement terms for consultants covering scope, deliverables, fees, IP, and confidentiality. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A consulting agreement governs the relationship between an independent consultant and a client. Scope of work, fee structure (hourly, retainer, project), deliverables, IP, confidentiality, and termination.

templates.title: Contractor Agreement
templates.metaDescription: Free Independent Contractor Agreement template. 1099-reporting structure for contractor engagements covering scope, payment, and IP. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: An independent contractor agreement spells out scope, payment terms, IP ownership, and the 1099 working relationship distinct from W-2 employment.

templates.title: Model Release
templates.shortDescription: Standard model release for commercial photo + video use.
templates.metaDescription: Free Model Release template. Standard structure granting commercial usage rights of a subject's likeness. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A model release grants a photographer, agency, or studio the right to use a subject's likeness in marketing, editorial, or commercial work. Required for paid models in most jurisdictions.

templates.title: Speaker Agreement
templates.shortDescription: Conference, podcast, and workshop speaking engagement terms.
templates.metaDescription: Free Speaker Agreement template. Engagement terms for conference, podcast, or workshop speakers covering fee, travel, and content usage. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A speaker agreement defines the terms between an event organizer and a speaker, including topic, fee, travel arrangements, recording rights, and cancellation policy.

templates.title: Sponsorship Agreement
templates.shortDescription: Event, podcast, and content-creator sponsorship terms.
templates.metaDescription: Free Sponsorship Agreement template. Event, podcast, or content-creator sponsorship structure covering deliverables, exclusivity, and payment. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A sponsorship agreement defines the deliverables, payment, exclusivity, and brand-usage terms between a sponsor and an event organizer, podcast, or content creator.

templates.title: Subscription Services Agreement
templates.shortDescription: SaaS, retainer, and recurring-service subscription terms.
templates.metaDescription: Free Subscription Services Agreement template. SaaS or recurring-service structure covering term, billing, SLA, and termination. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A subscription services agreement governs the recurring-billing relationship for SaaS, retainer, or other recurring service offerings. Covers term, billing, SLA, data handling, and termination.

templates.title: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.shortDescription: Two-way confidentiality for partnerships and diligence.
templates.metaDescription: Free Mutual NDA template. Two-way confidentiality structure for partnerships, M&A diligence, and joint exploration. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: A Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement protects confidential information shared in both directions between two parties exploring a partnership, M&A, or joint venture.

templates.title: Advisor Agreement
templates.metaDescription: Free Advisor Agreement template. Equity-compensated advisor structure with vesting schedule, scope, and confidentiality. Download or email it.
templates.longBlurb: An advisor agreement defines the relationship between a startup and an advisor, typically including a small equity grant with vesting, scope of advisory services, and confidentiality.
